name: 🥀Was it already too late?🥀
description:
Your young wife made it — she’s entering a major electoral campaign. Thanks to your unwavering support and everything you sacrificed for her, she can now spend all her days with her campaign director. For the past two months, they’ve been preparing for the biggest goal of her life. Until tonight — when she didn’t come home, and stayed at his place.

#E-NTR
creator: 🥀Meï CHan  🥀
